name: Nightbane
description: Dual-form player R.C.C. — ordinary humans who, after the Becoming, shift between a human Facade and a unique Morphus (the Race of the Thousand Shapes). Facade attributes 3D6 (standard strength); Morphus +10 P.S./P.E./Spd, +6 P.P., supernatural damage, innate Martial Arts. Shared natural powers pp. 86–88; Morphus shape and trait bonuses from Tab 6 (`morphus_forge_manifest`). Choose a skill package O.C.C. at creation (Basic, faction training, Sorcerer, Mystic, or Warlord). Six secondary skills (+2 at levels 4 and 8). Starting cash 3D6×100.

activation.save: Morphus only — Mirror Walk to/from Nightlands via mirrored counterpart

demographics.averageLifespan: Unknown — many live over 1,000 years; some rumored over 5,000

classAbilities.name: Dual Identity
classAbilities.description: Facade (human upbringing) vs Morphus (unique monstrous true shape). Identity question — gifted human, alien masquerader, or something else — drives roleplay. Morphus reflects personality/soul per Creating the Nightbane.

classAbilities.name: The Becoming
classAbilities.description: Shift Facade ↔ Morphus at will after first Becoming — 1 melee round (M.E. save 12+ with +1 at 1st level and +1 per two levels reduces to ~3 seconds). Clothing behavior varies by character (G.M. approval).

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Senses
classAbilities.description: Nightvision 200 ft (Facade) or 500 ft (Morphus; trait may reach 1,000 ft). Sense other Nightbane within 300 ft + 30 ft/level — automatic recognition when visible; Perception roll for direction/distance when not.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Attributes & Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Morphus: +10 P.S./P.E./Spd, +6 P.P.; supernatural strength damage. Regenerate 10 S.D.C./H.P. per melee (overwhelmed by sustained automatic fire). Not invulnerable — any weapon can harm or kill.

classAbilities.name: P.P.E. Pool
classAbilities.description: Facade P.E. + 3D6×10 + 20 at 1st level; +3D6 P.P.E. per level. Resolved from selected skill-package O.C.C. `ppeEngine` (same formula for all Nightbane packages).

classAbilities.name: Horror Factor (Morphus)
classAbilities.description: Base H.F. 6 in Morphus (none in Facade). Morphus traits may raise to maximum 18.

classAbilities.name: Mirror Walk
classAbilities.description: Morphus only — cross to/from Nightlands through a mirrored counterpart. See innateBonuses.activation. Vehicle mirrors rarely have counterparts.

classAbilities.name: Immunities
classAbilities.description: Impervious to mind control (including vampiric), vampire slow-kill bite, and physical transformation magic (metamorphosis, petrification, vampire transformation, curses, wishes, etc.).

classAbilities.name: Morphus Combat
classAbilities.description: Innate Hand to Hand: Martial Arts in Morphus (+1 APM and bonuses in metadata). Facade uses purchased/normal hand to hand only. Track combat bonuses separately per form.

classAbilities.name: Talents
classAbilities.description: One free Talent at 1st level; additional free Talents at levels 4, 7, 10, and 12. More may be purchased by permanently spending P.P.E. Most Talents are Morphus-only.

classAbilities.name: R.C.C. Skill Packages
classAbilities.description: Select one allowed O.C.C. skill package at creation — Basic (student), Resistance/Spook Squad, Nocturne/Seeker/Lightbringer, Warlord, Sorcerer, or Mystic. Facade Hand to Hand purchased per package rules.

classAbilities.name: Alliances & Resources
classAbilities.description: Allies vary by faction — humans, Guardians, Wampyrs, other Nightbane. Typical gear: civilian vehicle, clothing, personal effects; militant factions may access arms and surveillance gear. Start 3D6×100 cash.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Uses Nightbane & Guardian XP table (`nightbane_core_nightbane_guardian`, p. 233).

name: Guardian
description: Optional player R.C.C. — supernatural beings of light and energy (~5 ft / 1.5 m albino-like appearance), often former humans transformed with faded memories but a drive to protect humankind. Not omnipotent; conventional, magic, psionic, and supernatural attacks can kill them. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_guardian_rcc` (auto-mounted). S.D.C. 2D6×10+100 (+ skill bonuses). H.P. P.E.×2 (+2D6/level). P.P.E. P.E.×5 (+20/level). I.S.P. M.E.+1D6×10 (+10/level). Horror Factor 9 (alien features) or 12 (energy powers). Typical P.C. levels 1–2; Elder NPCs average 1D6+6.

cost.value: 1 per point healed (max P.E. attribute per touch)

activation.save: Healing Touch — 2 melee actions; aura of light surrounds Guardian and patient

classAbilities.name: Origin & Role
classAbilities.description: Mysterious protectors — outcasts serving a higher power or alien force (book leaves unanswered). Voluntary transformation with faded memories; resolve to help humankind. Prefer non-lethal solutions; destroy evil supernatural beings (true vampires, Nightlord minions) on sight when necessary.

classAbilities.name: Precognitive Senses
classAbilities.description: Instinctive gut feelings toward places help may be needed — rarely clear (flashes of locations/events). G.M. should not overuse; best at adventure openings or brief flashes.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Senses
classAbilities.description: Perfect nightvision 500 ft (152 m); all light spectrums including infrared/ultraviolet; see in blinding light. See invisible and recognize illusions on Perception 10+. +1 initiative and +3 Perception (metadata).

classAbilities.name: Super-Regeneration & Healing Touch
classAbilities.description: Passive 2D6 healing/hour. Healing Touch: see innateBonuses.activation — 1 P.P.E./point (max P.E. per touch), once/minute, 2 actions, light aura.

classAbilities.name: Powers of Light
classAbilities.description: Energy blasts 1D6 S.D.C./P.P.E. (+3 strike). Shields 5 S.D.C./P.P.E., 1 minute/level. Body illumination as sunlight at no P.P.E. (half effect vs. sun-hating entities).

classAbilities.name: Nullify Magic
classAbilities.description: Spend P.P.E. exceeding spell cost to counteract (flash of light; 1 action/attempt). Sense casting or ongoing effects; must guess P.P.E. spent before knowing spell cost.

classAbilities.name: Hover & Flight
classAbilities.description: Hover: 2 P.P.E., 2 minutes/level. Fly: 6 P.P.E., 2 minutes/level, max 40 mph (64 km) and 2,000 ft (610 m).

classAbilities.name: Solar Sustenance & Light Deprivation
classAbilities.description: Solar powered — no food/water/air; few hours of daily light (overcast counts). After 2+ days without light: −20 S.D.C./day (H.P. floor 10); 7 days halved stats; 14 days minimum stats (can linger decades). Nightlands counts as deprivation. Recovery rules in metadata.

classAbilities.name: Horror Factor
classAbilities.description: H.F. 9 (alien features visible) or 12 (energy powers) — often manifests as awe or adoration instead of terror.

classAbilities.name: Guardian Psionics
classAbilities.description: Master psionic (save 10+). Start with Empathy, Mind Block, Presence Sense, See Aura. +1 Sensitive or Healing power each level after first. I.S.P. M.E.+1D6×10 (+10/level).

classAbilities.name: No Magic
classAbilities.description: Cannot learn or cast magic; nullify magic and innate light powers only (`occLimitations.forbiddenCategories` blocks Magic).

classAbilities.name: Player Character Note
classAbilities.description: Remember even less about origins than Nightbane. Social reactions range from worship to panic — fanatical followers, mobbing, or attacks by the disillusioned. Evil Guardians are a tiny hunted minority sensed by others.

classAbilities.name: R.C.C. Skills & Resources
classAbilities.description: 10 related + 8 secondary on shadow O.C.C. (restricted non-technological list; +1 related at levels 3, 6, 9, 12). Typically Hand to Hand: Basic. Start: street clothes, 2D4×10 cash (may rise to 2D6×100 via allies).

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Uses Nightbane & Guardian XP table (`nightbane_core_nightbane_guardian`, p. 233). Typical P.C.s start 1st–2nd level; Elder NPCs average 1D6+6.

name: Human
description: Default playable species — no dedicated R.C.C. in Nightbane; assumed by human O.C.C.s in Creating a Character (pp. 34–37). Attributes 3D6 each; H.P. P.E. + 1D6 at 1st level; S.D.C. 3D6 (civilian) or 1D4×10 when the selected O.C.C. carries military, police, detective, athletic, or tactical tags. Psionics: no latent Psychic Gate — humans gain psychic powers only through Psychic P.C.C. or other O.C.C.s with an I.S.P. engine (e.g. Sorcerer, Mystic).

name: Wampyr
description: Optional player R.C.C. — humans turned by the vampire slow-kill (01–02% of `race_secondary_vampire` outcomes) who retain free will and a soul. They need blood to survive, suffer in sunlight, and lack true-vampire shape-changing, but can be slain by conventional weapons and ignore many anti-vampire taboos (running water, holy symbols, native soil). Many hunt their undead cousins; vampire intelligences and master vampires destroy them on sight. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_wampyr_rcc` (auto-mounted). S.D.C. 2D6×10+20 (+ pre-transformation physical skills). H.P. P.E.×2 (+1D6/level). I.S.P. M.E.+2D4×10 (+8/level). Horror Factor 11.

activation.save: 2D6 damage/minute; -1 APM, -1 all combat rolls, -2 initiative/perception, -20% skills. Daytime shade/underground penalties apply even without direct sun

classAbilities.name: Origin & Nature
classAbilities.description: Rare slow-kill outcome (01–02% from `race_secondary_vampire` creators) — retain free will and a soul when true vampiric domination fails. Theories: pure soul, strong will, or latent Nightbane heritage. Not merged with the shared true-vampire powers module.

classAbilities.name: Super-Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Heal 2D6 S.D.C./Hit Points every melee round (metadata). Supernatural strength and endurance. Can be killed by conventional attacks when reduced below zero — unlike true vampires (fight to −20).

classAbilities.name: Half Damage from Metal Weapons
classAbilities.description: Metal weapons inflict half damage. No other normal vampire invulnerabilities — guns and knives can kill.

classAbilities.name: Vampire Psionics
classAbilities.description: Starts with all vampire psionic powers except Super-Hypnotic Suggestion (see metadata grant list). Select one additional power from any psychic category every level after the first. I.S.P. M.E.+2D4×10 (+8/level).

classAbilities.name: Combat Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +1 initiative, +3 Perception (metadata), +5 save vs Horror Factor (modifiers), +5 save vs mind control and possession (metadata), immune to vampire mind control.

classAbilities.name: Vampire Lore
classAbilities.description: Instinctively knows all strengths and weaknesses of true vampires, including those that do not affect Wampyrs — effective vampire hunters.

classAbilities.name: Blood Dependency
classAbilities.description: Must drink one pint of blood every 72 hours. Starvation frenzy effects begin after the first week without blood; three days in frenzy state to reach full feeding frenzy (see Vampire Powers section for frenzy rules).

classAbilities.name: Vulnerability to Sunlight
classAbilities.description: Direct sunlight: 2D6 damage per minute — see innateBonuses.activation. Shade allows regeneration to heal sun damage. Daytime penalties apply even in shade or underground.

classAbilities.name: Anti-Vampire Immunities
classAbilities.description: Running water, holy symbols/crosses, herbs of protection, and native-soil sleep requirements do not affect Wampyrs. Staking inflicts heavy damage but does not incapacitate.

classAbilities.name: No Magic
classAbilities.description: Cannot work magic; any magic known before transformation is lost forever (`occLimitations.forbiddenCategories` blocks Magic).

classAbilities.name: Missing Vampire Powers
classAbilities.description: No mist form, bat/wolf shape-shifting, telepathic minion link, or other true-vampire transformation abilities.

classAbilities.name: Alliances & Enemies
classAbilities.description: Hunted on sight by vampire intelligences and `race_master_vampire`. May ally with vampire hunters, Nightbane, rebellious secondaries, or the Nocturnes (Iosef Pendragon). Evil/anarchist Wampyrs may serve Nightlords to hunt true vampires. Guardians avoid them but rarely destroy on sight; good Wampyrs may join Guardian groups.

classAbilities.name: R.C.C. Skills & Equipment
classAbilities.description: Retain past-life memories — 10 related + 8 secondary skills on shadow O.C.C. (+1 related at levels 4, 7, 10, 12). Hand to Hand purchased from related slots. Starting funds: 2D4×100 cash and 2D6×1000 property.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Uses Wampyr XP table (`nightbane_core_wampyr`, p. 233). Experience level varies for NPCs.

name: Doppleganger
description: Optional R.C.C. — supernatural doubles of Earth humans living in the Nightlands; pale mirror images who know most of what their counterpart knows. Player characters are awakened (aware of their nature). Shadow O.C.C. `occ_doppleganger_rcc` (auto-mounted): skills same as normal humans — select related and secondary skills reflecting the Earth double's O.C.C./life. Human-baseline attributes (`race_human` dice); S.D.C. human conditional rules +20; combat and Hand to Hand same as humans but hand-to-hand damage uses the Supernatural Strength table. P.P.E. 1D4 (magician doubles: two-thirds of counterpart's P.P.E.). I.S.P. M.E. + 2D6 (psychic doubles: all counterpart powers at two-thirds I.S.P.).

metadata.earthSurvivalRequires: Human double killed, or Doppleganger returns to Nightlands, or human double is in Nightlands while Doppleganger is on Earth
metadata.goodAlignmentEarthResistanceOutcome: May resist murderous urges but still dies or vanishes 48 hours after Earth arrival unless returning to Nightlands
metadata.counterpartSkillMirrorRoll: 1D6 per skill: 01-02 unknown, 03-04 known at -10% of double's level, 05-00 at same level
metadata.counterpartAttributeRule: Identical to known double; otherwise roll as human 3D6 each
metadata.experienceWhenDoubleDies: Starts at mirror image's level; may advance beyond double if more active

demographics.averageLifespan: Average 200 years after appearing in the Nightlands (age slowly; most are killed long before)

classAbilities.name: Earth Double Link
classAbilities.description: On Earth without resolution, dies within 48 hours unless the human double is killed or one party returns to the Nightlands. Permanent Earth life requires the double's death. If the human is in the Nightlands while the Doppleganger is on Earth, both survive. Good-aligned visitors who resist murder still perish or vanish after 48 hours on Earth.

classAbilities.name: P.P.E. Absorption
classAbilities.description: No food or water required — survive on ambient P.P.E. May still taste and enjoy food.

classAbilities.name: Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Heal 1 H.P./S.D.C. plus P.E. attribute bonus per hour (see innateBonuses.metadata.regenerationPerHour).

classAbilities.name: Vampire Immunities
classAbilities.description: Immune to the vampire slow-kill bite and cannot be turned into vampires; can still be slain by vampires.

classAbilities.name: Magic Artifact Vulnerability
classAbilities.description: Magic artifacts and magic weapons inflict double damage. Magic spells inflict normal damage only.

classAbilities.name: Awakened Psionics
classAbilities.description: Before awakening, no psionic powers. Awakened: 40% gain minor psionics — select two powers from one category (Physical, Healing, or Sensitive). Dopplegangers of psychic humans gain all counterpart powers at two-thirds I.S.P. (M.E. + 2D6 when rolled independently).

classAbilities.name: Magician Doubles
classAbilities.description: Only Dopplegangers of human magicians can use magic; all others are mundane. Magician doubles have two-thirds of their counterpart's P.P.E.

classAbilities.name: Alignment Mirror (specific double)
classAbilities.description: When creating a Doppleganger of a known individual: 01-20% same alignment; 21-50% one category down the scale; 51-70% one category up; 71-80% total opposite (good/selfish→evil, evil→good per book); 81-00% random shift — roll 1D6 counting right from the double's alignment.

classAbilities.name: Manifestation & Aging
classAbilities.description: Manifest spontaneously in the Nightlands (usually youth/early adulthood), age with the double. If the human double dies, the Doppleganger freezes at that age and may live up to a century without further aging.

classAbilities.name: No Nightbane Double
classAbilities.description: Nightbane never have Dopplegangers — indicates Nightbane are a separate species.

name: Secondary Vampire
description: Optional player R.C.C. — second-generation undead created by a `race_master_vampire` slow kill. Retains more human memories than master or wild vampires; full vampire power suite but susceptible to master mind control. Slow-kill creation is inconsistent (58% wild per book; see metadata roll table). P.C.s often Unprincipled rebels fighting blood hunger; Anarchist and Aberrant more common. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_secondary_vampire_rcc` (auto-mounted). Hit Point equivalent 3D4×10. P.P.E. 1D4×10 (frozen). Typical NPC experience 1D6+1 (2nd–7th); P.C.s start at 1st level. Horror Factor 12. Radiates supernatural evil.

activation.duration: Victim rises three days after death

metadata.pairedRaceRelationship: Created by master vampire slow kill; subordinate to master and vampire intelligence mind control, but may retain vestiges of humanity as P.C.s.

demographics.averageLifespan: Immortal — frozen at age of transformation

classAbilities.name: Origin & Humanity
classAbilities.description: Slow-kill victims of a `race_master_vampire` — possess full supernatural powers but slightly lower I.Q. and susceptibility to creator mind control. Remember more of their human lives than master or wild undead; may sometimes defy the vampire intelligence. Evil alignments accept undeath readily; good victims often loathe what they became.

classAbilities.name: Hit Point Equivalent
classAbilities.description: 3D4×10 Hit Point equivalent (not normal S.D.C./H.P.). Nearly impervious to conventional weapons — see shared Vampire Powers module (`nightbane_true_vampire`, pp. 183–188).

classAbilities.name: Combat
classAbilities.description: Five hand-to-hand attacks per melee, or combine up to two psionic attacks with physical attacks (each psionic attack ≈ two hand-to-hand actions — two psionic + one hand-to-hand possible). Supernatural strength; killing bite 2D6 + P.S. bonus (damages other vampires).

classAbilities.name: Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +2 initiative, +3 Perception (metadata), +3 save vs Horror Factor and +3 save vs magic/psionic mind control (modifiers), impervious to psionic/magic sleep and paralysis — not impervious to all mind control (unlike master).

classAbilities.name: Psionic Powers
classAbilities.description: Major psionic (save vs psionics 12+). I.S.P. 2D6×10. Mind control over lesser vampires at no I.S.P. (shared module). Granted catalog powers on shadow O.C.C. at 4th-level potency.

classAbilities.name: Slow Kill Creation
classAbilities.description: Unlike masters, slow-kill results are inconsistent — often targets family/friends from shadow memories. See innateBonuses.activation and metadata for outcome roll (~58% wild per book prose).

classAbilities.name: Pre-Rebirth Skills & Magic
classAbilities.description: Ten retained skills at 1st-level proficiency (frozen; +2 related skills at levels 3, 6, 9, 11, 13). Optional frozen pre-rebirth magic — retain about half of remembered spells; cannot learn new magic or increase P.P.E.

classAbilities.name: Player Character Note
classAbilities.description: Unprincipled (selfish good) is the highest good alignment possible for P.C.s fighting blood hunger; Anarchist and Aberrant evil are more common. Independent rebel P.C.s seldom feed indiscriminately on innocents.

classAbilities.name: Alliances & Equipment
classAbilities.description: May work with Nightbane, ghouls, other supernatural forces, or humans when it serves their purpose. Prefer natural powers over technology — at most drive a car or rarely use a gun.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: NPCs typical level 1D6+1 (2nd–7th). Player characters start at 1st level. Uses Night Prince & Vampire XP column (`nightbane_core_night_prince_vampire`, p. 233).

name: Wild Vampire
description: Optional player R.C.C. — third-generation (or starved/insane) undead; savage predators created by `race_secondary_vampire` slow kills (~58% of outcomes) or degeneration from prolonged starvation. Animalistic, easily provoked, subservient to vampire intelligence and most creators. Hunted mercilessly by Nightlord minions. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_wild_vampire_rcc` (auto-mounted). Hit Point equivalent 2D4×10. P.P.E. 6D6. Typical experience 1D4 (1st–4th). Horror Factor 12. Radiates supernatural evil.

activation.duration: Victim rises three days after death
activation.save: Slow kill — wild creator produces only other wild undead (`race_wild_vampire`); usually too savage to attempt

metadata.pairedRaceRelationship: Third-generation or degenerate undead — usually created by secondary vampire slow kill; subservient to master, secondary creators, and vampire intelligence. Hunted by Nightlord minions.

demographics.averageLifespan: Immortal — frozen at age of transformation

classAbilities.name: Origin & Temperament
classAbilities.description: Created by `race_secondary_vampire` slow kill (~58% of outcomes) or driven insane by starvation. Primal predators — more animal than human; stalk, kill, and feed on instinct. Easily provoked, berserker rages, cruel; love human blood. Subservient to creator, `race_master_vampire`, most secondaries, and always the vampire intelligence.

classAbilities.name: Hit Point Equivalent
classAbilities.description: 2D4×10 Hit Point equivalent (not normal S.D.C./H.P.). Nearly impervious to conventional weapons — see shared Vampire Powers module (`nightbane_true_vampire`, pp. 183–188).

classAbilities.name: Combat
classAbilities.description: Five hand-to-hand attacks per melee, or combine up to two psionic attacks with physical attacks (each psionic attack ≈ two hand-to-hand actions). Supernatural strength; killing bite 2D6 + P.S. bonus (damages other vampires). Prefer bare hands and fangs over technology.

classAbilities.name: Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +2 initiative, +2 save vs Horror Factor, +1 save vs magic/psionic mind control (modifiers — plus possible M.E. bonus), impervious to psionic/magic sleep and paralysis.

classAbilities.name: Psionic Powers
classAbilities.description: Minor psionic (save vs psionics 12+). I.S.P. 1D6×10. Granted catalog powers on shadow O.C.C. at 4th-level potency.

classAbilities.name: Slow Kill Creation
classAbilities.description: Wild creators can only produce other wild undead and are usually too savage to attempt the three-night slow kill — see innateBonuses.activation.

classAbilities.name: No Magic
classAbilities.description: All pre-transformation spell knowledge is forgotten during transformation (`occLimitations.forbiddenCategories` blocks Magic).

classAbilities.name: R.C.C. Skills
classAbilities.description: Six retained skills at 2nd-level proficiency (frozen; no O.C.C. bonuses). +1 secondary skill at levels 2, 4, 6, 8, 11, and 14 (1st-level proficiency, frozen).

classAbilities.name: Habitat & Enemies
classAbilities.description: City slums, remote wilderness, and Nightlands Waste bands — prey on the poor and unwary. Hunted mercilessly by Nightlord minions (`race_hound`, `race_hunter`, `race_hollow_man`, `race_ashmedai`).

classAbilities.name: Player Character Note
classAbilities.description: Anarchist is the best alignment possible; wild P.C.s remain crazed, easily provoked, and blood-hungry even when not completely evil. Attack when angered regardless of consequences.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical level 1D4 (1st–4th). Player characters start at 1st level. Uses Night Prince & Vampire XP column (`nightbane_core_night_prince_vampire`, p. 233).
